source_cards.name: SinaLab Arabic Synonyms Dataset
source_cards.primary_signal_summary: SinaLab resources listing marks Synonyms dataset as CC-BY-4.0.
source_cards.evidence_snippet: 110 lexicons and corpora 2M tokens. (CC-BY-ND-4.0) Salma WSD Arabic sense-annotated corpus (34k tokens). Multilevels: single-word, multi-word senses, and NER. (CC-BY-4.0) Synonyms Synonyms dataset, parallelly annotated by 4 linguists and fuzzy values. (CC-BY-4.0) ArabGlossBERT 167K context-gloss pairs labeled with True/False to train a TSV BERT model for WSD. (CC-BY-4.0) +
source_cards.intended_future_use: semantic alternatives/eval probes after artifact gate
source_cards.artifact_expectation: Synonyms dataset artifact, exact artifact URL not captured yet.

license_matrix.why: Primary resources page is promising, but SF.AI requires downloadable artifact license/checksum and mapping review before import.
